body.title: Habit health audit: systematic failure detection from conversation data
body.result: 6-detector diagnostic tool + 15 tests + MCP endpoint. Detects bare responses, habit misfires, thread drops, intent misclassification, TWM noise.
body.description: Build diagnostic tooling to detect habit failures from real conversation data. Three components: (1) Thread health diagnostic — TWM entry count, category breakdown, ring memory conversation ratio, response length, parsed intent correctness at time of each response. (2) Habit misfire detector — walk recent conversations, identify which habit fired on each turn, compare against what should have fired. (3) any-thoughts detector — find instances where Akien had to prompt for engagement, trace back to what failed. Can run as sleep-time activity or on-demand. Feeds into Igor self-repair: once a failure is identified, Igor should be able to update habit triggers/conditions/type in DB. Related: D147 (habit-fires-before-meaning), D201 (habit-conditions-schema).
